chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho C.P. No.D-4526 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.24026/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection a/w repl as at ‘A’. 3. For order on CMA No.20907/2023 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 31st October 2023 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, Advocate for Appellant. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, submits that the petitioner does not want to press instant petition and will approach the relevant forum for early hearing and decision of the case on merits. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
